The @nx/vue plugin provides various migrations to help you migrate to newer versions of vue projects within your Nx workspace.
Below is a complete reference for all available migrations.

## 22.0.x

### 22.0.0-package-updates
**Version**: 22.0.0-beta.8


#### Packages

The following packages will be updated:

| Name | Version | Always add to `package.json`
|---------|----------|---------|
| `@vitejs/plugin-vue` | `^6.0.1` | Updated only



## 20.7.x

### 20.7.1-package-updates
**Version**: 20.7.1-beta.0


#### Packages

The following packages will be updated:

| Name | Version | Always add to `package.json`
|---------|----------|---------|
| `vue` | `^3.5.13` | Updated only
| `vue-tsc` | `^2.2.8` | Updated only
| `vue-router` | `^4.5.0` | Updated only
| `@vitejs/plugin-vue` | `^5.2.3` | Updated only
